00015 static
00016 void
00017 try_execv(int dofork)
00018 {
00019         void * a0 = randptr();
00020         void * a1 = randptr();
00021         int result, pid, status;
00022         char buf[128];
00023 
00024         snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "execv(%p, %p)",
00025                 (a0), (a1));
00026         printf("%-47s", buf);
00027 
00028         pid = dofork ? fork() : 0;
00029         if (pid<0) {
00030                 err(1, "fork");
00031         }
00032         if (pid>0) {
00033                 waitpid(pid, &status, 0);
00034                 return;
00035         }
00036 
00037         result = execv(a0, a1);
00038         printf(" result %d, errno %d\n", result, errno);
00039         if (dofork) {
00040                 exit(0);
00041         }
00042 }

00671         }

00674                 return;

00676

00678         printf(" result %d, errno %d\n", result, errno);
00679         if (dofork) {

00681         }
00682 }

00798 
00799 static tryfunc funcs4[] = {
00800         try_execv,
00801         try_waitpid,
00802         try_open,
00803         try_read,
00804         try_write,
00805         try_close,
00806         try_lseek,
00807         try_fsync,
00808         try_ftruncate,
00809         try_fstat,
00810         try_remove,
00811         try_rename,
00812         try_mkdir,
00813         try_rmdir,
00814         try_chdir,
00815         try_getdirentry,
00816         try_dup2,
00817         try___getcwd,
00818         NULL
00819 };
00820 
00821 static tryfunc funcs5[] = {
00822         try_execv,
00823         try_waitpid,
00824         try_open,
00825         try_read,
00826         try_write,
00827         try_close,
00828         try_ioctl,
00829         try_lseek,
00830         try_fsync,
00831         try_ftruncate,
00832         try_fstat,
00833         try_remove,
00834         try_rename,
00835         try_link,
00836         try_mkdir,
00837         try_rmdir,
00838         try_chdir,
00839         try_getdirentry,
00840         try_symlink,
00841         try_readlink,
00842         try_dup2,
00843         try_pipe,
00844         try___time,
00845         try___getcwd,
00846         try_stat,
00847         try_lstat,
00848         NULL
00849 };
00850 
00851 static tryfunc *tables[4] = {
00852         funcs2,
00853         funcs3,
00854         funcs4,
00855         funcs5,
00856 };
00857 
00858 void
00859 trycalls(int asst, int dofork, int count)
00860 {
00861         tryfunc *list;
00862         int i, j;
00863 
00864         assert(asst>=2 && asst<=5);
00865         list = tables[asst-2];
00866 
00867         for (i=0; i<count; i++) {
00868                 for (j=0; list[j]; j++) {
00869                         (*list[j])(dofork);
00870                 }
00871         }
00872 }
00873
Generated on Sun Jun 27 22:12:14 2010 for Os/161 by  1.6.1
